briefdescription.para: Check if Access Point is running.

simplesect.para: true if AP is active, false otherwise

memberdef.name: StartScan

parameterdescription.para: Maximum number of networks to return (0 for all)

simplesect.para: hf_wifi_err_t::WIFI_SUCCESS on success, error code otherwise

SSID string, empty if not connected

parameterdescription.para: Buffer to store MAC address (6 bytes)
WiFi interface (0 for station, 1 for AP)

simplesect.para: hf_wifi_err_t::WIFI_SUCCESS on success, error code otherwise

parameterdescription.para: WiFi interface (0 for station, 1 for AP)

briefdescription.para: Protected constructor - only derived classes can instantiate.
Copy constructor - deleted to prevent copying.
Assignment operator - deleted to prevent copying.
Abstract base class for WiFi functionality.

detaileddescription.para:
This class provides the interface for WiFi operations including:
Station mode operations (connecting to networks)
Access Point mode operations (creating hotspots)
Network scanning and discovery
Security configuration
Event handling and callbacks
Power management
